messages.message: Invalid JSDoc tag name "filename:".
Expected "extra" to come before "stack".

fix.text:
extra: e,
        message: String((err as any)?.message ?? err),
        stack: (err as any)?.stack

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'form', 'initialAmount', 'initialRecipientId', and 'initialSourceBankId'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [form, initialAmount, initialRecipientId, initialSourceBankId]

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'autoSubmit', 'form', 'initialAmount', 'initialRecipientId', 'initialSourceBankId', and 'onSubmit'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [autoSubmit, form, initialAmount, initialRecipientId, initialSourceBankId, onSubmit]

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'createLinkToken'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. If 'createLinkToken' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [createLinkToken, userId]

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'createLinkToken'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. If 'createLinkToken' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [userId, plaidContext, createLinkToken]
